title: Auld Lang Syne
description: Auld Lang Syne melody reference imported from a Kuailepu detail page and normalized into the current lightweight ocarina-tab renderer.
alignedLyrics: Should old ac quaint ance be for got, and
nev er brought to mind? Should _ old ac quaint ance
be for got, and days of auld lang syne? For auld _ lang _
syne, my dear, for auld _ lang _ syne, we'll take a cup of
kind ness yet, for auld _ lang _ syne.
extraLyrics: We twa hae run a bout the braes, And pud the gow ans fine But weve wand erd mony a wear y foot, Sin auld _ lang _ syne.
We twa hae paid ld i the burn, Frae morn ing sun till dine But _ seas be tween us braid hae roard Sin auld _ lang _ syne.
And theres a hand, my trust y fiere! And gies a hand o thine! well _ tak a right gude willy wau ght, For auld _ lang _ syne.
